title: Senior Backend Engineer (Distributed Systems)
requirements: 5+ years of backend development experience, with at least 2 years leading the design of business-critical microservices.
Expert proficiency in Python (FastAPI/Asyncio) or Go (Concurrency patterns, Goroutines) with a focus on writing memory-efficient, thread-safe code.
Deep experience with Apache Kafka, including partition tuning, consumer group management, and implementing idempotent producers for exactly-once processing.
Advanced PostgreSQL knowledge: Indexing strategies, query optimization, connection pooling (PgBouncer), and experience with horizontal scaling (sharding or Read Replicas).
Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes (K8s), including writing Helm charts, configuring HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler), and managing resource limits/quotas.
Proven track record in RESTful and gRPC API design, specifically focusing on versioning strategies, rate-limiting, and comprehensive OpenAPI/Swagger documentation.
Operational experience with AWS (EKS, RDS, S3) or GCP (GKE, Cloud Spanner), including IAM least-privilege security and VPC networking.
Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or GitLab CI, with an emphasis on automated testing (Unit, Integration, and E2E).
Strong understanding of Distributed Systems: CAP theorem, distributed locking, circuit breakers, and consensus algorithms (Raft/Paxos).
Proficiency with Terraform for Infrastructure as Code (IaC), including module development and state management.
nice_to_have: Active contributions to open-source projects or a history of technical blogging/mentorship.
Experience with Observability stacks: OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, and Jaeger for distributed tracing.
Knowledge of Security-by-Design: OWASP Top 10, OAuth 2.1/OIDC, and secret management (HashiCorp Vault/AWS Secrets Manager).
Familiarity with Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate) or RAG pipeline orchestration for AI-integrated services.
responsibilities: Architect and implement high-throughput, low-latency backend services capable of handling 10k+ requests per second.
Lead technical RFC (Request for Comments) processes, driving consensus on architecture decisions across multiple engineering teams.
Own the full lifecycle of critical infrastructure components, from initial capacity planning to post-deployment scaling and incident response.
Optimize system performance by identifying bottlenecks through profiling (cProfile, pprof) and implementing intelligent caching layers with Redis.
Collaborate with Product and Frontend teams to define robust API contracts, ensuring backward compatibility and seamless integration.
Mentor junior and mid-level engineers through high-quality code reviews, pair programming, and internal tech talks.
